name: coTfsSDOUpload
title: coTfsSDOUpload
syntax: long coTfsSDOUpload( dword index, dword subIndex ); // form 1
long coTfsSDOUpload( dword index, dword subIndex, dword outSize[1], byte outValueBuf[], dword valueBufSize ); // form 2
long coTfsSDOUpload( dword index, dword subIndex, dword outSize, qword outValueBuf); // form 3
description: This function executes a complete SDO upload. Depending on the number of data, this is either an expedited upload (up to 4 bytes) or a segmented transfer. After a successful upload, the data received can be called up with the command coTfsGetSdoUploadData. (form 1)
Alternatively the function can return the received data automatically. (form 2)
This function syntax can only be used for expedited uploads. (form 3)

parameters.name: valueBufSize
parameters.description: Buffer size in byte of outValueBuf.

parameters.name: outSize
parameters.description: Size of the data to be transmitted.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
